summaries.theme_name: Poor Customer Support and Withdrawal Issues
actionable_ideas: Improve customer support response times and agent competence to resolve issues efficiently
Streamline withdrawal processes to reduce waiting times and provide more transparent updates
Enhance transparency regarding fees and charges to avoid hidden costs and build trust with customers

verbatim_quotes.quote: They are fine till you dont need them . The moment you need a resolution it is impossible to connect to their agent and even if by God's grace that happens that agent would not be competent enough to resolve your issue.
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]

verbatim_quotes.quote: worst support ever, just like airtel you never get a chance to speak to a customer support agent
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]

verbatim_quotes.quote: Worst support team I've ever seen. Replying too late and flood of response once reply then suddenly close the ticket.
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]
